mapper.sql: name, num, optime, gsnum, starttime, endtime, company_code, create_time, modify_time, delete_time, sort, process_key, process_id, form_no, process_task_i18n, process_status, process_name, process_version, effect_time, id, version, valid, pos_lay_rec, owner_pos_code, owner_pos_name, create_pos_code, create_pos_name, owner_staff_code, owner_staff_name, delete_staff_code, delete_staff_name, modify_staff_code, modify_staff_name, create_staff_code, create_staff_name, owner_dept_code, owner_dept_name

name, num, optime, gsnum, starttime, endtime, company_code, create_time, modify_time, delete_time, sort, process_key, process_id, form_no, process_task_i18n, process_status, process_name, process_version, effect_time, id, version, valid, pos_lay_rec, owner_pos_code, owner_pos_name, create_pos_code, create_pos_name, owner_staff_code, owner_staff_name, delete_staff_code, delete_staff_name, modify_staff_code, modify_staff_name, create_staff_code, create_staff_name, owner_dept_code, owner_dept_name
SUM(gsnum) AS gsnum, SUM(sort) AS sort, SUM(id) AS id, SUM(version) AS version, SUM(valid) AS valid

sql.trim:
version = #{entity.version} + 1 ,
name = #{entity.name},
name = null,
num = #{entity.num},
num = null,
optime = #{entity.optime},
optime = null,
gsnum = #{entity.gsnum},
gsnum = null,
starttime = #{entity.starttime},
starttime = null,
endtime = #{entity.endtime},
endtime = null,
company_code = #{entity.companyCode},
company_code = null,
create_time = #{entity.createTime},
create_time = null,
modify_time = #{entity.modifyTime},
modify_time = null,
delete_time = #{entity.deleteTime},
delete_time = null,
sort = #{entity.sort},
sort = null,
process_key = #{entity.processKey},
process_key = null,
process_id = #{entity.processId},
process_id = null,
form_no = #{entity.formNo},
form_no = null,
process_task_i18n = #{entity.processTaskI18n},
process_task_i18n = null,
process_status = #{entity.processStatus},
process_status = null,
process_name = #{entity.processName},
process_name = null,
process_version = #{entity.processVersion},
process_version = null,
effect_time = #{entity.effectTime},
effect_time = null,
valid = #{entity.valid},
valid = null,
pos_lay_rec = #{entity.posLayRec},
pos_lay_rec = null,
owner_pos_code = #{entity.ownerPosCode},
owner_pos_code = null,
owner_pos_name = #{entity.ownerPosName},
owner_pos_name = null,
create_pos_code = #{entity.createPosCode},
create_pos_code = null,
create_pos_name = #{entity.createPosName},
create_pos_name = null,
owner_staff_code = #{entity.ownerStaffCode},
owner_staff_code = null,
owner_staff_name = #{entity.ownerStaffName},
owner_staff_name = null,
delete_staff_code = #{entity.deleteStaffCode},
delete_staff_code = null,
delete_staff_name = #{entity.deleteStaffName},
delete_staff_name = null,
modify_staff_code = #{entity.modifyStaffCode},
modify_staff_code = null,
modify_staff_name = #{entity.modifyStaffName},
modify_staff_name = null,
create_staff_code = #{entity.createStaffCode},
create_staff_code = null,
create_staff_name = #{entity.createStaffName},
create_staff_name = null,
owner_dept_code = #{entity.ownerDeptCode},
owner_dept_code = null,
owner_dept_name = #{entity.ownerDeptName},
owner_dept_name = null,

mapper.update:
UPDATE aipro_qjdst
WHERE id = #{entity.id} and version = #{entity.version}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM aipro_qjdst WHERE id = #{id} AND valid = 1

SELECT FROM aipro_qjdst
ORDER by id DESC
ORDER by sort

SELECT FROM aipro_qjdst
ORDER by sort

SELECT
FROM aipro_qjdst T1 RIGHT JOIN ( SELECT ID subId FROM aipro_qjdst
ORDER by id DESC limit #{query.startSize} , #{query.pageSize}) T2 ON T1.ID = T2.subId ORDER by id DESC

SELECT FROM aipro_qjdst T1 RIGHT JOIN ( SELECT ID subId FROM aipro_qjdst
limit #{query.startSize} , #{query.pageSize}) T2 ON T1.ID = T2.subId
ORDER by id DESC
ORDER by sort
